shared_files.note: Testing-only iteration — no builders, no code changes

testing_plan.regression_reason: Risk score 4 from iteration 81 (9 files, shared components touched). 4 build iterations since last regression (iter 79). FEAT-047 fully complete across iters 80-82 — first acceptance test.
testing_plan.acceptance_scope: All 3 sub-tasks: [1/3] data layer, [2/3] UI, [3/3] polish
acceptance_checks: Runbook types exist in database.ts: Runbook, RunbookStep, RunbookStatus (active|completed|cancelled), RunbookStepStatus (pending|in_progress|completed|skipped)
Migration 016 defines runbooks + runbook_steps tables with correct columns, RLS policies, indexes, triggers
API routes: GET /api/v1/runbooks?workspace_id= returns list, POST /api/v1/runbooks creates with step snapshot, GET /api/v1/runbooks/:id, PATCH /api/v1/runbooks/:id, DELETE /api/v1/runbooks/:id
API routes: GET /api/v1/runbook-steps?runbook_id= returns steps, PATCH /api/v1/runbook-steps/:id updates status/notes/assigned_to
Client wrappers: fetchRunbooks, createRunbook, fetchRunbook, updateRunbook, deleteRunbook, fetchRunbookSteps, updateRunbookStep
Runbook list page at /w/[workspaceId]/runbooks — shows name, status badge, progress bar, section name, date, filter tabs (All/Active/Completed/Cancelled)
Runbook view page at /w/[workspaceId]/runbooks/[runbookId] — linear checklist with step name, status, notes, assigned_to
4-state step status transitions: pending → in_progress → completed, pending → skipped, in_progress → skipped
Progress bar + progress text breakdown (e.g., '3 completed, 1 in progress, 2 pending, 1 skipped')
Complete button with confirmation dialog — sets runbook status to 'completed', completed_at timestamp
Cancel button with confirmation dialog — sets runbook status to 'cancelled'
Read-only mode: completed/cancelled runbooks disable all controls (no status changes, no notes editing)
Metadata footer on runbook view: created date, started date, completed date (if applicable), created by
'Run as Checklist' button on section-detail-panel — creates runbook from section's steps
Sidebar nav: 'Runbooks' item with ClipboardList icon at /runbooks
workspace-shell.tsx: 'runbooks' in reserved paths array (not treated as tab ID)
Auth guards: runbooks and runbook-steps API routes return 401 for unauthenticated requests
RLS: runbooks and runbook_steps scoped to workspace via can_access_workspace()
regression_checks: TypeScript compilation: npx tsc --noEmit passes clean
ESLint: npm run lint passes (only pre-existing warnings)
/login renders (curl 200)
/workspaces redirects unauthenticated (curl 307→login)
Canvas view: canvas-view.tsx renders FlowCanvas with step/section nodes
Step detail panel: click step → panel opens with name, status, notes, maturity, comments tab, tasks tab
Section detail panel: click section → panel opens with name, description, 'Run as Checklist' button, task rollup
Journey canvas: journey-canvas-view.tsx renders stages + touchpoints
Touchpoint/stage detail panels: click → panel opens
Step list view: step-list-view.tsx renders filterable step table
Gap analysis: gap-analysis-view.tsx renders maturity gap ranking
Comparison view: compare-view.tsx renders side-by-side canvases
Settings: perspectives management, public sharing toggle
Teams/People/Tools pages: CRUD operations, search/filter
Dashboard page: workspace overview with metrics
Comments system: comment-panel.tsx, CommentCountsContext, workspace comments page with entity nav links
Tasks system: task-panel.tsx, TaskCountsContext, task count badges on step nodes, section-level rollup
Canvas node badges: comment count (bottom-right), task count (bottom-left, step only), annotation dots
Annotation panel: shows empty state when no perspective active (IMP-006)
PDF export: pdf.ts imports valid, no type errors
PNG export: png.ts + use-canvas-export.ts valid
API auth guards: workspaces, steps, perspectives, annotations, teams return 401 unauthenticated
API POST-only routes: sections (405 on GET), stages (405 on GET)
